name: Eclipse Core
description: The flagship executor featuring auto-inject, a built-in script library, and a premium interface designed for seamless execution across all supported games.

name: Nova Hub
description: A lightweight hub built for speed and stealth. Minimal footprint with maximum performance, optimized for competitive environments.

name: Phantom X
description: An advanced hub featuring a fully custom UI, macro recording system, and multi-script execution. Built for power users who demand full control.

name: Velocity
description: Performance-optimized hub engineered for competitive play. Features low-latency injection and real-time script profiling tools.

name: Zenith
description: The beginner-friendly hub with guided setup, one-click execution, and an intuitive interface. Perfect for users new to scripting.

name: Dark Matter
description: Enterprise-grade hub with multi-game support, session persistence, and advanced obfuscation. The most comprehensive tool in the ecosystem.
